## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Use token/extension '...'
2. Apply to widget '...'
3. See error

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots
